summary: Iteration 254 — SystemHealthWidget integration and Outbound Audit Log verification complete. All 8 test cases passed. Backend: GET /api/dashboard/system-health returns correct data structure with data_counts, company_settings, outbound_activity, warnings fields. Frontend: SystemHealthWidget renders on Dashboard after login with 'Stato Sistema' header, displays fatture/preventivi/commesse/invii 7gg stats, refresh button works. Code inspection confirms log_outbound calls with correct action_types in all 4 route files.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SystemHealthWidget is integrated into Dashboard.js at line 225, after IntegrityWidget. The widget loads data from GET /api/dashboard/system-health which requires authentication. Outbound audit logging is implemented in sopralluogo.py (email_perizia), ddt.py (email_ddt), conto_lavoro.py (email_conto_lavoro), and preventivi.py (email_preventivo). All log_outbound calls write to 'outbound_audit_log' collection.
